decisions.title: Formal license procurement or supported integration
blockingIssues: Formal production license or supported license-service integration has not been confirmed.
nextActions: Attach vendor confirmation, contract reference, or supported integration design.

decisions.title: License expiry behavior
blockingIssues: License expiry behavior has not been rehearsed in a non-production environment.
nextActions: Run expiry/failure-mode rehearsal and record user-visible behavior.

decisions.title: Emergency bypass approval and audit
blockingIssues: Emergency bypass approval path and audit rule are not signed.
nextActions: Define approver, max duration, audit log location, and rollback-to-license procedure.

decisions.title: Redis, Nacos and gateway license config backup/restore
blockingIssues: License-related Redis/Nacos/gateway config backup and restore proof is missing.
nextActions: Attach backup/restore commands and rollback rehearsal evidence.

decisions.title: License monitoring and audit
blockingIssues: Monitoring, alerting and audit evidence are not attached.
nextActions: Define alert rule, dashboard, log query and incident runbook.
